display_information.name: CodeSentinel
display_information.description: AI-powered codebase health agent. Detects dead code, circular dependencies, high coupling, and architectural drift — all from Slack.
display_information.long_description:
CodeSentinel is an AI-powered Slack agent that keeps your codebase healthy. It analyzes your repository for dead code (unused definitions), circular dependencies between modules, excessive coupling (fan-out metrics), and architectural drift (layer boundary violations). It provides rich visual reports with severity-coded Block Kit UI, trending health scores, and actionable fix suggestions — all surfaced directly inside Slack where your team already works.

Technologies: Slack AI capabilities, MCP Server integration, Real-Time Search API

assistant_view.assistant_description: Analyze your codebase for dead code, circular dependencies, coupling issues, and architectural drift. Supports GitHub repo URLs, GitLab projects, and direct code snippets.

suggested_prompts.title: Scan for dead code
suggested_prompts.message: Analyze the codebase for dead code — functions, classes, and modules that are defined but never referenced anywhere.

suggested_prompts.title: Find circular dependencies
suggested_prompts.message: Detect circular dependencies between modules. Show the dependency cycles as a graph.

suggested_prompts.title: Check coupling metrics
suggested_prompts.message: Run a coupling analysis. Show which modules have the highest fan-out and identify tightly coupled clusters.

suggested_prompts.title: Full health scan
suggested_prompts.message: Run a complete codebase health scan: dead code, circular deps, coupling, and architectural drift.
